formatted_display: English: Monday, 16 March 2026 | Nepali: Monday, 02 Chaitra 2082
quote: To be heroic is to be courageous enough to die for something; to be inspirational is to be crazy enough to live a little.
formatted_quote: "To be heroic is to be courageous enough to die for something; to be inspirational is to be crazy enough to live a little." - Criss Jami
